case_title: NAYOMI HO VS. CORRENTI BOYS, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, NAYOMI AS TO DEFENDANT CORRENTI BOYS, INC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-26-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-03-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-26-2015 CONTINUED TO OCT-07-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-07-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15309029)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
